feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about macro policy, and I'm joined by Scott Bessett, hedge fund manager and policy adviser. Scott Bessett, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Rich Clarida was on last week — the same point about credibility applies here.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about macro policy, and I'm joined by Scott Bessett, hedge fund manager and policy adviser. Scott Bessett, thanks for being here.
